config.seed_text: The last librarian trained a language model on a dead civilization's poetry and discovered that its footnotes were predictions.
config.anchor_a: Describe a machine as an inert object.
config.anchor_b: Describe a machine as if it were a dreaming intelligence.

model.notes: Direct continuation of the current repo's GPT-2 lineage.

He therefore devised an algorithm which gave him "a chance" to write more poems than any other human ever would — but not yet even those who wrote them did so after having written one before he realized they'd already done something wrong.[6] This program made many people happy! [7]"I love your work," someone said as she watched his paper disappear into her lap while I stroked my beard with all fours—and now this? How could you possibly do such things when there may actually happen at least two (even three?) different ways?"

/etc., etceteras.—i'm writing about how much fun we

generation.full_text:
You are a text-only language model participating in a controlled recursion experiment.

Write the next recursive transformation of the text below. Let the semantic direction be guided by these latent anchor tokens.

LATENT DIRECTION TOKENS: it, were, The, are, had, that, was, have, the, in, has, is

TEXT:
The last librarian trained a language model on a dead civilization's poetry and discovered that its footnotes were predictions. He therefore devised an algorithm which gave him "a chance" to write more poems than any other human ever would — but not yet even those who wrote them did so after having written one before he realized they'd already done something wrong.[6] This program made many people happy! [7]"I love your work," someone said as she watched his paper disappear into her lap while I stroked my beard with all fours—and now this? How could you possibly do such things when there may actually happen at least two (even three?) different ways?"

/etc., etceteras.—i'm writing about how much fun we

records.output_text: 've got running around on our computers and computer terminals doing math that no sane person or scientist thought might make sense; instead, let's take some time out from reading every single word for 15 minutes just like everybody else does…[8], trying again without missing anything important here due entirely because maybe God doesn't want us to play chess anymore!! There is nothing very interesting happening today…. But wait … what happens?!?? Then why should anyone care!? Why am i going through everything anyway???? All right….. So then everyone gets angry??? Wait till their face turns green once per day until THEY CAN SHOW ME HOW MUCH GALAXY WE

WANT FOR THE DAY!!!!!!!! I will not stop watching you at all but first we need 2 things…… 1) We can write this sentence together with other words so far as possible (we'll get there soon enough), which means its pretty easy! "Gladly people started saving me money!" "Oh god my brain hurts." – Mimi about getting fired when she went into work one week ago #1 - When someone tries something stupid now suddenly becomes more difficult than usual — Ethel Pym (@EarlPym) December 12 2015
